title: Epstein Obtained Objects From Islam’s Holiest Site for His Island ‘Mosque’
summary_full: Jeffrey Epstein’s messages cast light on an unusual building on his private island and show how his connections helped him secure tapestries from Mecca for it.
summary_public: Jeffrey Epstein’s messages cast light on an unusual building on his private island and show how his connections helped him secure tapestries from Mecca for it.
